name: Cardamom Fudge ( Sheer Payra)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, milk, salt, and corn syrup in a 2-quart saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches 240°F on a candy thermometer or forms a soft ball when dropped into cold water.
3. Remove from heat and stir in margarine. Cool the mixture to 120°F without stirring (the bottom of the pan will be lukewarm).
4. Add cardamom and beat vigorously until the mixture thickens, becomes less glossy, and holds its shape when dropped from a spoon (about 5-10 minutes).
5. Quickly stir in nuts.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9x5x3-inch loaf pan. Allow to cool before cutting into 1-inch squares.
